{{CargoOrgan
|name=Twin-Tendril Tail
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10689
|idx=47
|description=Two filament tails weave and spiral with graceful motion. Winged at the tips, they dance like spirits of the sky, emanating an enchanting elegance filled with mystique.
|skill=On combat start, summon Twin Vines to attack the enemy, dealing DMG equal to 102% of ATK!
|hp=1490
|def=205
|atk=337
|rush=154
|gene1=In Gastric Pouch combat, CRIT +15%
|gene2=Per 2 Gastric Pouch LVLs challenged, {race} ATK +5
Gastric Pouch LVLs: 100/100
|gene3=Earth DMG +90
|gene4=Per 2 Gastric Pouch LVLs challenged, {race} RUSH +5
Gastric Pouch LVLs: 100/100
|gene5=Crit DMG +7.5%
|gene7=Earth DMG +270 (Awakened)
|}}
